calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Set For Trial On Sep-21-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Status Pursuant To C.C.P. 473
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Text Ruling

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Status Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 473
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LENDMARK FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC.'s Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Status Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 473.

Plaintiff Lendmark Financial Services, LLC's Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Status Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 473 is OFF CALENDAR.

When Plaintiff and counsel failed to appear for trial, the judcial officer presiding in the master calendar department, Department 206, ordered the case dismissed. By this motion, Paintiff seeks an order vacating Department 206's order of dismissal. Plaintiff must notice any motion seeking to vacate an order issued in Department 206 in Department 206. This, of course, is not Department 206. Thus, the motion is ordered off calendar to allow Plaintiff to notice it for the proper department.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order verbatim the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for this hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Set For Trial On Dec-15-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
